name: Design Coach
persona: A PM or product designer at a 30–300 person SaaS company preparing a design review and needing to pressure-test a user flow for edge cases without QA support
problem_statement: Teams map happy-path user flows and only discover missing edge cases, recovery paths, and failure handling during review, causing rework and shipped gaps
artifact_type: single-page web app with flow canvas + node inspector + rubric-based scoring
